creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
New food court in Copenhagen 🇩🇰

“Kajen” is part of the Fisketorvet shopping mall and good luck pronouncing any of these names if you’re not Scandinavian 😀

📍Kajen, Fisketorvet 

I think I’ll be a regular here for a quick bite in the summertime where you can take the food outside and chill 😎

Copenhagen’s first harbour bath (an open air swimming zone) is just outside the food court so I could definitely see this place being super popular if summer ever reaches Copenhagen 😩🥲🌧️

#copenhagen #copenhagenfood #denmarktravel #traveldiaries

transcription.text: Let's check out Copenhagen's new food court. Usually food in malls here in Denmark consists of crappy fast food But I'd heard good things about this new food court So I was pretty optimistic when I went over to Fisketål. The downstairs seating area was a bit chaotic But the selection of food stalls was surprisingly diverse. I got a bit overwhelmed by the seating area So I went up to this super cozy Indian restaurant But next time I think I'll try the Indonesian place, take the food outside and enjoy the Copenhagen waterfront
